title: jacobaeastrum lineare
intro: Jacobaeastrum lineare, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Jacob's ladder include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to promote healing and alleviate various health complaints.
